meta.summary: Kraken 2.17.1 runtime for taxonomic classification of sequencing reads against user-provided Kraken 2 databases.
meta.description: Kraken 2.17.1 runtime for taxonomic classification of sequencing reads against user-provided Kraken 2 databases.

test: kraken2 --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Kraken version 2.17.1' >/dev/null && kraken2-build --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Kraken version 2.17.1' >/dev/null && kraken2-inspect --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Kraken version 2.17.1' >/dev/null && k2 --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx '2.17.1' >/dev/null

kraken2 --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: kraken2 [options] <filename(s)>' >/dev/null && kraken2-build --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--download-taxonomy' >/dev/null && kraken2-inspect --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: kraken2-inspect [options]' >/dev/null && k2 --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'classify' >/dev/null
python3 -c 'import bz2, gzip, lzma, ctypes, pathlib; root = pathlib.Path("/opt/kraken2/bin"); ctypes.CDLL(str(root / "libtax.so")); print("python deps ok")'
segmasker -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'segmasker' >/dev/null && dustmasker -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'dustmasker' >/dev/null && blast_to_fasta -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'blast_volume' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-kraken2-classify-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; kraken2 --db /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/tiny-db --report "$tmp/report.tsv" --output "$tmp/output.tsv" /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/lambda-read.fa >/tmp/taf-kraken2-classify.stdout 2>"$tmp/run.log"; test -s "$tmp/report.tsv"; test -s "$tmp/output.tsv"; grep -F 'Escherichia virus Lambda' "$tmp/report.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F "$(printf 'C\tlambda_read\t10710\t')" "$tmp/output.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-kraken2-classify.stdout

tmp=/tmp/taf-kraken2-inspect-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; kraken2-inspect --db /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/tiny-db > "$tmp/inspect.tsv" 2>"$tmp/run.log"; test -s "$tmp/inspect.tsv"; grep -F 'Escherichia virus Lambda' "$tmp/inspect.tsv" >/dev/null; k2 inspect --db /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/tiny-db --output "$tmp/k2-inspect.tsv" 2>"$tmp/k2-inspect.log"; test -s "$tmp/k2-inspect.tsv"; grep -F 'Escherichia virus Lambda' "$tmp/k2-inspect.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-kraken2-build-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp/db/taxonomy"; cp /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/taxonomy/names.dmp /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/taxonomy/nodes.dmp "$tmp/db/taxonomy/"; kraken2-build --db "$tmp/db" --add-to-library /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/lambda-reference.fa --no-masking >"$tmp/add.log" 2>&1; kraken2-build --db "$tmp/db" --build --threads 1 --kmer-len 21 --minimizer-len 15 --minimizer-spaces 0 >"$tmp/build.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/db/hash.k2d"; test -s "$tmp/db/opts.k2d"; test -s "$tmp/db/taxo.k2d"; kraken2 --db "$tmp/db" --output "$tmp/out.tsv" /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/lambda-read.fa >"$tmp/stdout.log" 2>&1; grep -F "$(printf 'C\tlambda_read\t10710\t')" "$tmp/out.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-kraken2-compressed-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; gzip -c /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/lambda-read.fa > "$tmp/lambda-read.fa.gz"; kraken2 --db /opt/kraken2/test-fixtures/tiny-db --gzip-compressed --output "$tmp/out.tsv" "$tmp/lambda-read.fa.gz" >"$tmp/stdout.log" 2>"$tmp/run.log"; grep -F "$(printf 'C\tlambda_read\t10710\t')" "$tmp/out.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"
